title: Class Action: In a class action lawsuit, how many plaintiffs must demonstrate...
summary: Determine the number of plaintiff claims needed for collective proof in a class action lawsuit.
prompt: In a class action lawsuit, how many plaintiffs must demonstrate claims against a common defendant?

options.text: One person's claim will be sufficient to prove the damages suffered by all

solution: In a class action lawsuit, proof of one person's claim will be sufficient to prove the damages suffered by all plaintiffs. This legal mechanism allows individuals with similar claims against a common defendant to consolidate their cases, enhancing efficiency and access to justice.
